name: Golf Club At Bear Dance
about: The Golf Club at Bear Dance is an 18-hole championship golf course situated on 753 acres of mountainous terrain in Larkspur, Colorado. The course features mature Ponderosa Pines, oak-lined ridges, and native grass valleys, with an average elevation of 6,800 feet, offering views of the Front Range and Rocky Mountains. It has been consistently rated as Colorado's best and most challenging public golf course, awarded #1 Course along the Front Range from 2014-2022. The facility is also home to the Colorado Section of the Professional Golfers' Association of America. The venue provides a variety of membership options, a restaurant, and a PGA Golf Instruction program. Additionally, it features a Trackman simulator for year-round play and practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Pristine mountain course setting with stunning Rocky Mountain views
Home of the Colorado PGA section, indicating high-quality instruction and standards
Trackman simulator technology available for advanced analysis and play regardless of weather
Consistently ranked as Colorado's top public golf course
Multiple membership options available to suit different needs and levels of play

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant available with 'Bear Dance Flavor' cuisine
Full service bar available at the on-site restaurant

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced radar-based launch monitor for swing and ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The facility encourages players to bring their own clubs. The website mentions club rentals are available, but specific details on rental process are not provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: An on-site restaurant is available for dining. The venue does not specify a policy on bringing outside food or drinks, so it's recommended to inquire directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The course is described as challenging and consistently rated as Colorado's best, suggesting a typical 18-hole round would take approximately 4-5 hours, depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-oriented with membership options available and features a variety of events, including wedding celebrations, indicating a welcoming environment for all ages.
